entries.title: HOMILIES ON EZEKIEL 9:3 on ezekiel 16:51
entries.excerpt: My Lord Jesus Christ is justified according to the dispensation of the flesh that he purified for our salvation, by Abraham, by Isaac, by Jacob and by the rest of the prophets.

entries.title: HOMILIES ON EZEKIEL 9:3 on ezekiel 16:51
entries.excerpt: Before Christ it was not possible for the light of the righteous to shine.
